User task:

Theorem title: Untitled theorem

Target node:

{
  "id": "diff",
  "title": "Difference satisfies the homogeneous heat equation",
  "informal_statement": "For \\(w=u-v\\), one has \\(w_t=w_{xx}\\) on \\((0,L)\\times(0,T)\\), with \\(w(x,0)=0\\) and \\(w(0,t)=w(L,t)=0\\).",
  "informal_proof_text": "Subtract the equations for \\(u\\) and \\(v\\). The common initial data gives \\(w(x,0)=0\\), and the homogeneous Dirichlet conditions give zero boundary values for \\(w\\).",
  "formalization_priority": 3,
  "formalization_rationale": "A useful reduction node that packages the subtraction \\(w=u-v\\) and the inherited homogeneous data before the energy estimate."
}

Immediate parent summary:
[]

Verified child context:
[]

Scratch file to create and edit: /Users/adihaya/GitHub/formal-islands/lean_project/FormalIslands/Generated/diff_worker.lean

Operate only inside the Lean workspace above, and only edit the specified scratch file. Do not modify other repository files.

Within this single run, you may inspect local files, write the scratch file, run `lake env lean <scratch_file_path>` from the Lean workspace root, read compiler feedback, and revise the same file until it succeeds or you run out of time.

Prefer narrow, specific imports that match the identifiers actually used in the theorem. Do not default to `import Mathlib` for a small local theorem when a few focused imports would do, and do not guess speculative deep module paths.

Bias strongly toward faithfulness to the target node. Reuse the node's concrete variables and hypotheses when reasonable. Do not introduce arbitrary index types, unrelated function families, or a much more generic theorem unless the node text clearly requires that abstraction.

Do not game the task by collapsing the node to an easy nearby side fact. If you simplify, the replacement should still carry meaningful inferential load in the parent proof.

Return a JSON object with keys lean_theorem_name, lean_statement, and final_file_path. The final_file_path must be exactly the scratch file path above.

json_schema.title: AgenticFormalizationResult

raw_stdout:
{"lean_theorem_name":"diff_satisfies_homogeneous_heat_equation","lean_statement":"theorem diff_satisfies_homogeneous_heat_equation
    {L : ℝ}
    {_T : ℝ}
    {u v ut vt uxx vxx : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ}
    (hPDEu : ∀ x t, ut x t = uxx x t)
    (hPDEv : ∀ x t, vt x t = vxx x t)
    (hInit : ∀ x, u x 0 = v x 0)
    (hBdy0 : ∀ t, u 0 t = v 0 t)
    (hBdyL : ∀ t, u L t = v L t) :
    let w : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ := fun x t => u x t - v x t
    (∀ x t, ut x t - vt x t = uxx x t - vxx x t) ∧
    (∀ x, w x 0 = 0) ∧
    (∀ t, w 0 t = 0) ∧
    (∀ t, w L t = 0) := by
  dsimp
  constructor
  · intro x t
    rw [hPDEu x t, hPDEv x t]
  · constructor
    · intro x
      simp [hInit x]
    · constructor
      · intro t
        simp [hBdy0 t]
      · intro t
        simp [hBdyL t]","final_file_path":"/Users/adihaya/GitHub/formal-islands/lean_project/FormalIslands/Generated/diff_worker.lean"}

index a86c86883708e6e328a910e683f5ef3ff4e6933f..c604795eceeb2ea315ecf825e8ddbee24417a5c0
--- a/lean_project/FormalIslands/Generated/diff_worker.lean
+++ b/lean_project/FormalIslands/Generated/diff_worker.lean
@@ -1 +1,32 @@
--- agentic formalization worker scratch file
+import Mathlib.Data.Real.Basic
+
+namespace FormalIslands
+
+theorem diff_satisfies_homogeneous_heat_equation
+    {L : ℝ}
+    {_T : ℝ}
+    {u v ut vt uxx vxx : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ}
+    (hPDEu : ∀ x t, ut x t = uxx x t)
+    (hPDEv : ∀ x t, vt x t = vxx x t)
+    (hInit : ∀ x, u x 0 = v x 0)
+    (hBdy0 : ∀ t, u 0 t = v 0 t)
+    (hBdyL : ∀ t, u L t = v L t) :
+    let w : ℝ → ℝ → ℝ := fun x t => u x t - v x t
+    (∀ x t, ut x t - vt x t = uxx x t - vxx x t) ∧
+    (∀ x, w x 0 = 0) ∧
+    (∀ t, w 0 t = 0) ∧
+    (∀ t, w L t = 0) := by
+  dsimp
+  constructor
+  · intro x t
+    rw [hPDEu x t, hPDEv x t]
+  · constructor
+    · intro x
+      simp [hInit x]
+    · constructor
+      · intro t
+        simp [hBdy0 t]
+      · intro t
+        simp [hBdyL t]
+
+end FormalIslands
